name: Instagram Post
description: Create and publish Instagram posts via Graph API. Supports scheduling via scheduled_posts table.

credentials_required.label: Instagram Long-Lived Access Token
credentials_required.hint: Generate via Meta Developer App → Graph API Explorer → extend to 60-day token

tools.name: create_instagram_post
tools.description: Create and publish an Instagram post with image and caption

tools.name: schedule_post
tools.description: Schedule a post for later publication

author: freddy-schuetz
